title: Readability: canonicalize_display_name variable shadowing obscures pipeline intent
description: The function uses triple shadowing of 's' (lines 54–59) to apply sequential transformations: NFC normalize, bidi check, ZWS strip, trim. This is idiomatic Rust, but in a security-critical function, named intermediate variables (e.g. normalized, zws_stripped) would improve clarity and maintainability for future reviewers. Current approach is correct; enhancement is optional.
close_reason: Updated doc comment with Unicode spoofing security rationale; renamed intermediate variables normalized/no_zwc/trimmed for clarity
